invariant.evidence: Lines 37-40: claims triad monoid is 'unique 3-element monoid with absorber and involution' without proof or exhaustive check
invariant.weakness: needs actual enumeration of all 3-element monoids to prove uniqueness

spectral.evidence: Lines 274-300: explicit eigenvalue computation, spectral gap = 1/3 for triad and 9-state algebras
spectral.weakness: would be stronger with spectral decomposition or eigenvector analysis

semantically_mappable.evidence: Lines 88-92: labels like 'neither', 'A_only', 'both' map to Boolean states; Lines 472-478: gates map to operations
semantically_mappable.weakness: mapping is suggestive rather than systematic - no formal semantic algebra defined

ouroboros.evidence: Lines 334-358: stationary vector is fixed point of transition matrix; Lines 78-83: algebra encodes its own fixed points
ouroboros.weakness: doesn't show encoding multiplication table on itself

time_like.evidence: Lines 381-413: entropy increases over time in Markov chain; Lines 105-106: decay rate (2/3)^n toward absorber
time_like.weakness: would be stronger with explicit time operator or clock algebra

space_like.evidence: Lines 416-431: Boolean lattice adjacency matrix, 2-cube graph with spectrum {2,0,0,-2}
space_like.weakness: only demonstrates for Boolean component, not full 9-state algebra

physics_like.evidence: Lines 434-467: Z_2 charge conservation in non-boundary sector, symmetry breaking at boundary
physics_like.weakness: conservation law is multiplicative not additive; no Noether theorem

logic_gated.evidence: Lines 469-488: explicit gates IDENTITY(+1), NOT(-1), RESET(0) with verification of involution
logic_gated.weakness: limited to three gates, no composition rules or universal gate set

self_recursive.evidence: Lines 489-521: T^n converges to stationary distribution monotonically

living_state.evidence: no thermodynamic potential, free energy, or temperature defined
living_state.weakness: would need Hamiltonian, partition function, or entropy production rate

discrete_continuous_bridge.evidence: Lines 522-551: rate matrix L = T - I generates continuous-time Markov chain, e^L verified
discrete_continuous_bridge.weakness: embedding is trivial (T at unit time); no continuum limit shown

llm_integrable.evidence: no embedding or projection code implemented
llm_integrable.weakness: would need actual interface to vector embeddings or tokenization

maps_known_structures.evidence: Line 46: mentions 'Klein four-group' for Z_2 x Z_2 but doesn't prove isomorphism
maps_known_structures.weakness: no formal isomorphism proofs or category theory mappings

dimensionless_ratios.evidence: Lines 554-571: explicit ratios 3/4, 1/3, 1/2 derived from structure not constants
dimensionless_ratios.weakness: ratios emerge but aren't shown to be fundamental or universal

unit_sphere_grounded.evidence: Lines 573-588: stationary distribution on L^1 unit sphere (probability simplex)
unit_sphere_grounded.weakness: only shows normalization, not geometric interpretation

shape_memory.evidence: no deformation theory or recovery mechanism shown
shape_memory.weakness: would need explicit deformation map with information preservation

topological_spectral.evidence: Lines 591-619: graph Laplacian computed, algebraic connectivity, Betti number β_0 = 1
topological_spectral.weakness: only β_0 shown, no higher Betti numbers or spectral-topological theorem

llm_scores.overall_assessment: Solid mathematical derivation with 12/17 properties demonstrated through explicit computation, but the uniqueness claim for the triad monoid lacks proof and several properties (living_state, llm_integrable, shape_memory) are entirely absent.
